data.title: China Construction Bank Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results with Significant Dividends
data.description:
China Construction Bank ( (HK:0939) ) has shared an update.

China Construction Bank Corporation announced its audited annual results for 2024, revealing a total cash dividend of approximately RMB100,754 million for the year. The results, which have been reviewed and approved by the bank’s board and audited by Ernst & Young, reflect a strong financial performance with an unqualified audit opinion, indicating robust management of various risks and a commitment to shareholder returns.

More about China Construction Bank

China Construction Bank Corporation is a major financial institution in the People’s Republic of China, primarily engaged in providing a wide range of banking services including corporate and personal banking, treasury operations, and asset management. The bank is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and operates under the regulations of international financial reporting standards.

data.title: DEOLEO S.A. Announces Board Changes with New Director Appointment
data.description:
An announcement from DEOLEO S.A. ( (ES:OLE) ) is now available.

DEOLEO S.A. has announced the resignation of Mr. Juan Arbide Estensoro from its Board of Directors due to conflicting work commitments. The company has appointed Mr. Pier Luigi Sigismondi as a new director and member of the Audit and Control Committee and the Appointments and Remuneration Committee, following a proposal by OLE INVESTMENTS, BV. This change is expected to bring new expertise to the board, potentially impacting the company’s strategic direction.

More about DEOLEO S.A.

DEOLEO S.A. is a company listed on the Madrid, Bilbao, Valencia, and Barcelona Stock Exchanges, operating in the food industry with a focus on olive oil production and distribution. It is associated with OLE INVESTMENTS, BV, which is controlled by CVC CAPITAL PARTNERS, PLC.

data.title: Voltaic Strategic Resources Announces Leadership Changes in 2024 Annual Report
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Eon NRG Limited ( (AU:VSR) ).

Voltaic Strategic Resources Limited has released its annual report for the year ending December 31, 2024, highlighting key changes in its board of directors. Daniel Raihani has been appointed as the new Non-Executive Chairman, succeeding John Hannaford, who retired from the position. The report also notes the retirement of directors Lachlan Reynolds and David Izzard, with Michael Walshe joining as a new Non-Executive Director. These leadership changes are expected to influence the company’s strategic direction and operations moving forward.

More about Eon NRG Limited

Voltaic Strategic Resources Limited operates in the resources sector, focusing on strategic resource exploration and development. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the code VSR and is based in West Perth, Australia.

data.title: eMudhra Limited Announces Changes in Board of Directors
data.description:
The latest update is out from eMudhra Limited ( (IN:EMUDHRA) ).

eMudhra Limited has announced changes in its Board of Directors, with the completion of tenure for Mr. Manoj Pundalik Kunkalienkar as an Independent Director, effective March 31, 2025. Concurrently, the company has appointed Mr. Venkatadri Chandrasekaran and Mr. Shivanand Rama Shettigar as Additional Non-Executive, Independent Directors, starting April 1 and April 2, 2025, respectively. These appointments are subject to shareholder approval within three months. These changes are part of eMudhra’s compliance with regulatory requirements and aim to strengthen its governance structure.

More about eMudhra Limited

eMudhra Limited operates in the digital security and solutions industry, focusing on providing digital identity and transaction management solutions. The company is known for its digital signature certificates and related services, catering to a wide range of sectors requiring secure digital transactions.

data.title: Seazen Group Announces Board Restructuring with Key Appointments
data.description:
Seazen Group Ltd. ( (HK:1030) ) has shared an update.

Seazen Group Limited announced significant changes in its board structure, with the resignation of Mr. Zhang Shengman as a non-executive director and ESG committee member, effective April 1, 2025. Mr. Zhang leaves to pursue other endeavors, with no disagreements reported. Concurrently, Mr. Zhou Fudong has been appointed as an executive director and ESG committee member, bringing nearly 20 years of financial management experience to the role. Mr. Zhou’s extensive background within the company and prior roles at prestigious firms like PricewaterhouseCoopers and Baker Tilly China positions him well to contribute to Seazen’s strategic goals. These changes reflect the company’s ongoing commitment to strengthening its governance and leadership team.

More about Seazen Group Ltd.

Seazen Group Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the real estate industry with a focus on property development and management. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and engages in various environmental, social, and governance (ESG) initiatives.
